description: The Dolmak Heavy Guard is renowned for its formidable armored units, capable of withstanding intense enemy fire for much longer than would seem possible. Like a rolling wave, their advance is slow but unstoppable.

rule.name: Dolmak Scaling Systems
rule.description:
Shots against allied Dolmak vehicles get -1AP per size of the ally above the enemy, up to -2AP and to a maximum of 9+. 
Apply only when rolling up.

scheme.name: Still Standing
scheme.description:
If your opponent's units have less total Health than yours, you gain 3 VP.
Otherwise, you gain 1 CP.

commands.name: Ironclad Armor
commands.when: When an enemy unit declares an allied Vehicle as the target for shooting
commands.effects:
If the allied unit is not a Dolmak unit, it gains the Dolmak Scaling Systems ability.
Otherwise, double the effect of Dolmak Scaling Systems for these shots, up to -4AP.
Other restrictions still apply.

commands.name: Keeping Momentum
commands.targets: All Vehicle units on your army
commands.effects: Until end of cycle, those units can be Ordered to Move ignoring their M characteristic.

commands.name: Size Matters
commands.effects: Fire the target ally. That shot gains +2AP per size of the ally above the enemy, up to +4AP.

abilities.name: Field Repairs
abilities.description:
As a Secondary Action: An allied vehicle in this unit's tile recovers 1 HP.
This ability has Loading 1.

abilities.name: Towing
abilities.description:
At the end of your turn, you may link or unlink this unit with another Vehicle on the same tile.
While these units are linked, they can't shoot, the other unit cannot move, and the Movement characteristic of this unit becomes the other unit's M +1, up to 3.
When this unit moves, the linked unit moves with it and is considered part of its model for movement legality.
This unit can start the battle linked to another unit.
